zh.Banchory, Fifeshire, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾班喬利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel Inchmartin於1340年出生在蘇格蘭培爾時，她的父親John Inchmartin20歲，母親Margaret Wemyss25歲。她和Sir Alan Erskine of Inchmartin至少有4個女兒。她去世於1399年在蘇格蘭費伏享年59歲。

zh-hans.Banchory, Fifeshire, Scotland: 英国苏格兰阿爾迪史爾班喬利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel Inchmartin于1340年出生在苏格兰培爾时，她的父亲John Inchmartin20岁，母亲Margaret Wemyss25岁。她和Sir Alan Erskine of Inchmartin至少有4个女儿。她去世于1399年在苏格兰費伏享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobelle

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel Inchmartin was born in 1340, in Perthshire, Scotland, her father, John Inchmartin, was 20 and her mother, Margaret Wemyss, was 25. She had at least 4 daughters with Sir Alan Erskine of Inchmartin. She died in 1399, in Fife, Scotland, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel Inchmartin est née en 1340, à Perthshire, Écosse, son père, John Inchmartin, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Margaret Wemyss, avait 25 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 filles avec Sir Alan Erskine of Inchmartin. Elle est décédée en 1399, à Fife, Écosse, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel Inchmartin 1340 in Perthshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Inchmartin 20 und ihre Mutter Margaret Wemyss 25. Sie hatte mit Sir Alan Erskine of Inchmartin mindestens 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1399 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Fife, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Inchmartin è nata il nel 1340 nel Perthshire, Scotland, sua padre, John Inchmartin, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Margaret Wemyss, aveva 25 anni. Lei avuto almeno 4 figlie con Sir Alan Erskine of Inchmartin. Morì nel 1399, nel Fife, Scotland, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel Inchmartinが1340年にスコットランドペルスシュアイアで生まれた時，父John Inchmartinは20歳，母Margaret Wemyssは25歳であった。彼女はSir Alan Erskine of Inchmartinとの間に少なくとも4人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1399年にスコットランドフィフで59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel Inchmartin(이)가 1340년 스컷랜드 퍼스실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Inchmartin(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Wemyss(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 Sir Alan Erskine of Inchmartin(와)과 적어도 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1399년 스컷랜드 피프에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Inchmartin nasceu em 1340, em Perthshire, Scotland, seu pai, John Inchmartin, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Wemyss, tinha 25 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 4 filhas com Sir Alan Erskine of Inchmartin. Ela faleceu em 1399, em Fife, Scotland, com 59 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel Inchmartin родилась в 1340 г. в местности пиртшир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени John Inchmartin было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Wemyss, 25. У неё было по крайней мере 4 дочери от Sir Alan Erskine of Inchmartin. Она умерла в 1399 г. в местности фиф, Шотландия в возрасте 59 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabel Inchmartin nació en 1340, en Perthshire, Scotland, su papá, John Inchmartin, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Margaret Wemyss, tenía 25 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijas con Sir Alan Erskine of Inchmartin. Murió en 1399, en Fife, Scotland, a la edad de 59 años.
